name: clarity-journey
description: A six-stage landing-site audit that walks the visitor's journey — promise, fold, narrative, trust, pricing, action — scoring each stage against anchored rubrics grounded in the primary literature (Kahneman, Ariely, Thaler, Simonson, Krug, Sugarman, Fogg, Cialdini, Pirolli & Card, Baymard, NN/g).
